loop1.note: Showing total active energy (kWh) and reactive energy (kVArh) for this month; SEC and subsidy target are not measured for this panel.

loop1.note: Showing Worst Peak and Feeder Demand trends (UPS, BPDB) — Load Factor is not measured by this asset's meter and no recovery fn is available in the basket.
